bullets: Direct tips: the Domme receives the full amount; the platform fee is paid by the Sub.
Other features (PPV, communities, etc.) may have their own fee models. You’ll see details directly in the flow.
Payouts: documented transparently in your wallet.
fees.title: Fees — short & sweet

clearTransparent.text: Clear rules on fees and payouts (SEPA, more to come).
clearTransparent.title: Clear & transparent

flexibleSources.text: Direct tips, pay-per-view, custom tributes & paid communities.
flexibleSources.title: Flexible revenue streams

walletRealtime.text: Earnings land instantly in the Domme wallet and history.
walletRealtime.title: Wallet in real time

methodCard.featureHint: Use this feature where it fits your audience — pricing and messaging are key.

bullets: Subs set up regular payments (e.g., €5 daily, €20 weekly).
Runs automatically until stopped — full control with the Sub.
Dommes can actively “request” such drainers.
steps: Track durations and proactively renew before expiry.
customTributes.title: Custom tributes (drainer / tribute timer)

bullets: Dommes with high earnings are prominently listed.
Badges & milestones increase social proof.
More visibility → more Sub motivation → more revenue.
steps: Show badges on your profile & in communities.
leaderboardBadges.title: Leaderboard & badges (gamification)

bullets: Create a community with paid access.
Subs pay monthly or one-time to join.
Exclusivity + group dynamics = higher lifetime value.
steps: Define clear value (e.g., weekly drops, live Q&A, polls).
Set a price and cap slots for scarcity.
Promote invites on profile & in chat.
paidCommunities.title: Community memberships (paid communities)

bullets: All earnings collect in the Domme wallet (export available for bookkeeping).
Payout via SEPA/bank transfer (later: PayPal, crypto).
Clear overview in “Earnings & history.”
payouts.note: Note: payout options may vary by region.
steps: Start a payout from your wallet.
Download CSV/export for accounting if needed.
payouts.title: Payouts

bullets: Premium content (e.g., NSFW media) visible only for a micropayment.
Ideal for high chat volume or exclusive drops.
Granular pricing possible (e.g., per image/clip).
steps: Set a fair price and tease the content.
Use story/feed/chat to drive traffic to PPV.
ppv.title: Pay-per-view (optional)

bullets: Sub sends any amount via the tip button in chat or on profile.
Domme receives the full amount.
Platform fee is borne by the Sub.
Visible instantly in wallet & earnings history.
steps: Enable tips on your profile (if disabled).
Mention your tip button in chat.
Thank publicly — social proof boosts follow-up tips.
tips.title: Direct tips (tributes)
